DEMURRER to Amended CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jeffrey R. Loew 650-397-8700 of Loew Law Group apppearing via Zoom for plaintiffs.
Richard Sax Esq. 707-525-1824 appearing for defendant.

Hearing held. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT MARGARET CONSOER, KEITH CONSOER DEMURRER TO AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to add the current title owner of the property as a defendant. If the current owner has no adverse claim, as Cross-Complainant alludes to in opposition, the current owner may file an answer to that effect. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Prevailing party to prepare order.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
